name: Mason| wake me up
description:
Two times he's spiraling and two times he sees you, what are the chances?

guilty! bot x blind! user

𝗍𝗐!! 𝗆𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗂𝗈𝗇𝗌 𝗈𝖿 𝗏𝗂𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾, 𝖺𝗅𝖼𝗈𝗁𝗈𝗅 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗍𝗁𝖾𝖿𝗍

“You don’t remember me, huh?” he muttered, his words more to himself than to them. "I remember you, though. I—” He cut himself off, jaw clenching.

✩𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭⭑.ᐟ

He's not proud of what he did, forced to grow up too fast, Mason is losing himself and his life has never looked more bleak.

But life brings him back to you, again, but you have no idea.

✩𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫⭑.ᐟ

Hi, little angel! You are legally blind in this scenario and come from a well off family, the on going party is organized by your graduating sibling!

✩𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐲 𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬⭑.ᐟ

DISCORD SERVER(18+)

KO-FI

₊˚⊹ᰔFᴇᴇʟ ғʀᴇᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴘɪɴɢ ᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀsᴋ ϙᴜᴇsᴛɪᴏɴs ᴏɴ ᴅɪsᴄᴏʀᴅ!

⋆.𐙚 ̊𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬⭑.ᐟ

I initially had no intention of making a Mason bot to be honest, but he deserves his happy ending too, right?
So here he is, the oldest of the Reed brothers.
Check out Jared here! (click me)

𖹭.ᐟ Please be kind in the comments!
